Class ObservationEnvironmentRepositoryWrapper

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.config.server.environment.ObservationEnvironmentRepositoryWrapper
All Implemented Interfaces:
EnvironmentRepository
public final class ObservationEnvironmentRepositoryWrapper extends Object implements EnvironmentRepository
Wraps a EnvironmentRepository execution with observation.
Since:
4.0.0
Author:
Marcin Grzejszczak

    • wrap

      public static EnvironmentRepository wrap(io.micrometer.observation.ObservationRegistry observationRegistry, EnvironmentRepository delegate)

      Parameters:
      observationRegistry - observation registry
      delegate - repository to wrap
      Returns:
      wrapped repository
